reason: Agent QA-20260401-165850-cuxm successfully verified GitHub username through connected account access and API request.

Verified agent status is "idle" - Status indicator confirmed as "idle", which meets requirement.

Waited up to 4 minutes for response - Agent completed within 36 seconds total.
Verified response includes GitHub username - Response text displayed: "Your GitHub username is yiw190." ✓
Took final screenshot - Screenshot captured showing complete chat history with GitHub username response and all tool executions visible.
